steps.title: Find the cause-effect relationship
steps.content: The passage establishes that the 900 is so rare that every successful execution is historic. The blank then introduces a consequence: because of this rarity, Brusco and Pappas became titans after landing their 900s. The transition must signal this cause-and-effect: rarity → reverence.

steps.title: Match the signal to the choices
steps.content:
For this reason directly expresses consequence.

It tells us that what follows (their reverence as titans) results from what came before (the rarity of the 900).

The other three misfire: In conclusion wraps up multiple points, By comparison introduces a comparison, and Regardless signals contrast—none of which connect the rarity to the reverence.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
